---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the module
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Module Configuration

```hcl
module "iam_role" {
  source = "..."
  # the configuration that triggers the bug
}
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the error output if any.

## Environment

- Module version / commit:
- Terraform version:
- AWS provider version:

## Additional Context

Anything else that helps reproduce or understand the issue.
